uuid.description: Unique identifier of an information request

company_uuid.description: Unique identifier of the company to which the information requests belongs

status.description: The status of the information request

blocking_payroll.description: If true, this information request is blocking payroll, and may require response or requires review from our Risk Ops team.

required_questions.description: The list of required questions for the information request

response_type.description: The type of response to the question

404.description:
Not Found 
  
The requested resource does not exist. Make sure the provided UUID is valid.
